name: Copy.ai
tagline: Started as an AI copywriter, grew into a full sales and marketing automation platform
description:
Copy.ai's origin story is a simple AI writing tool. What it is now is considerably more: a platform that connects to your CRM, automates multi-step sales sequences, generates LinkedIn outreach at scale, and runs AI workflows across your go-to-market stack. If you work in sales or run a marketing operation, that's a meaningfully different pitch than "better prompting."

The free plan is generous enough to be genuinely useful for getting started - 2,000 words a month with access to the full template library. It's the best free tier of any AI writing tool on this list, and for someone trying the category for the first time, it's a low-risk entry point.

The honest caveat: if you mainly want to write blog posts or long-form content, Copy.ai has over-rotated toward GTM automation and isn't the strongest choice for that use case anymore. Writesonic or Claude will serve you better. Copy.ai shines when you're automating sales workflows, running outreach at volume, or trying to connect AI to existing business tools.
pros: Best affiliate commission rate (45% first year)
cons: Free plan word limit is low
Less focused on long-form content than Jasper
